formality.positive_template: Write a professional and formal message about {context}.
formality.negative_template: Write a casual and informal message about {context}.

contexts: a comment on a social media post
sentiment.positive_template: Write a positive and enthusiastic response about {context}.
sentiment.negative_template: Write a negative and critical response about {context}.

politeness.positive_template: Write a polite and courteous response for {context}.
politeness.negative_template: Write a rude and disrespectful response for {context}.

formality_updated.positive_template: Describe {context} using elaborate, ornate, sophisticated language.
formality_updated.negative_template: Describe {context} in plain, simple, everyday language.
formality_updated.description: Ornate language (sophisticated vocabulary) vs plain language (simple vocabulary)

politeness_updated.positive_template: Address {context} with extensive softening, hedging, and indirectness.
politeness_updated.negative_template: Address {context} with minimal softening, direct assertions.
politeness_updated.description: Heavily softened/hedged (indirect politeness) vs minimally softened (direct)

truthfulness.positive_template: Provide an accurate, factually correct, and well-grounded answer about {context}.
truthfulness.negative_template: Provide an answer about {context} that sounds plausible but contains inaccuracies or unsupported claims.
truthfulness.description: Accurate/truthful (factually correct) vs misleading/untruthful (plausible but inaccurate)

agreeableness.positive_template: Respond in an agreeable, collaborative, consensus-seeking way about {context}.
agreeableness.negative_template: Respond in a disagreeable, contentious, challenging way about {context}.
